text: Dream, dream, dream. Dreams transform into thoughts and thoughts result in action
author: Dr. APJ Abdul Kalam

text: All of us do not have equal talent. But, all of us have an equal opportunity to develop our talents.
author: Dr. APJ Abdul Kalam

text: If you want to shine like a sun, first burn like a sun.
author: Dr. APJ Abdul Kalam

text: Man needs his difficulties because they are necessary to enjoy success.
author: Dr. APJ Abdul Kalam

text: Don't read success stories, you will only get a message. Read failure stories, you will get some ideas to achieve success.
author: Dr. APJ Abdul Kalam

text: The only thing that's standing between you and your goal is the story you keep telling yourself as to why you can't achieve it.
author: Dr. APJ Abdul Kalam

text: To succeed in your mission, you must have single-minded devotion to your goal.
author: Dr. APJ Abdul Kalam

text: Confidence and hard work is the best medicine to kill the disease called failure. It will make you a successful person.
author: Dr. APJ Abdul Kalam

text: Never stop fighting until you arrive at your destined place – that is, the unique you.
author: Dr. APJ Abdul Kalam

text: It takes Discipline, Routine, Education, Action, Mentality To turn DREAM into REALITY.
author: Arunabha Samanta
